plugin.name: PortalUse
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Tracks worn portal usage with colour output; can show destination area from PortalDex.

trigger.match: You stop using (.+) as a portal

trigger.name: scan_end
trigger.match: ^(You have \d+|There are no items|The \w+ is empty)

muclient.script:
--------------------------------------------------------- -- PortalUse 2.0 (formerly Portal Usage Tracker v8.0) ---------------------------------------------------------
local usage = {} local ignore = {} local colors = {} local data_file = "PortalUse.dat" local bag_keyword = "" local scan_active = false local show_area = false -- show destination area (from PortalValue 3.0's catalog)
-- theme colours (RGB hex of @x099 / @x045 / @W / @x048) for our own output; -- portal NAME rendering keeps its own captured colours and is never changed. local TC = { hdr = "#875fff", val = "#00d7ff", num = "#ffffff", ok = "#00ff87" }
-- Read the portal catalog written by PortalValue 3.0 (PortalDex folded in) and -- return a map of lowercased portal name -> destination area ("Leads to"). -- Returns {} if PortalValue 3.0 isn't installed / hasn't scanned. local function load_portaldex_areas () local f = io.open(GetInfo(66) .. "PortalDex_data.lua", "r") if not f then return {} end local content = f:read("*a"); f:close() local ok, data = pcall(function() return assert(loadstring(content))() end) if not ok or type(data) ~= "table" or type(data.catalog) ~= "table" then return {} end local map = {} for _, e in pairs(data.catalog) do if e.name and e.leads and e.leads ~= "?" then map[e.name:lower()] = e.leads end end return map end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Utility ---------------------------------------------------------
local function clean_name (s) s = s:gsub("\27%[[0-9;]*m", "") s = s:gsub("<[^>]+>", "") s = s:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") return s end
local function rgb_to_hex (n) if not n then return "#ffffff" end local r = n % 256 local g = math.floor(n / 256) % 256 local b = math.floor(n / 65536) % 256 return string.format("#%02x%02x%02x", r, g, b) end
local function rgb_to_xterm (n) if not n then return 7 end local r = n % 256 local g = math.floor(n / 256) % 256 local b = math.floor(n / 65536) % 256 if r == g and g == b then if r < 8 then return 16 end if r > 238 then return 231 end return math.floor((r - 8) / 10) + 232 end local function to6 (v) if v < 48 then return 0 elseif v < 115 then return 1 elseif v < 155 then return 2 elseif v < 195 then return 3 elseif v < 235 then return 4 else return 5 end end return 16 + 36 * to6(r) + 6 * to6(g) + to6(b) end
local function extract_name_styles (styles, plain_name) if not styles or #styles == 0 then return nil end local full_text = "" for _, sp in ipairs(styles) do full_text = full_text .. (sp.text or "") end local s, e = full_text:find(plain_name, 1, true) if not s then return nil end local result = {} local pos = 1 for _, sp in ipairs(styles) do local sp_text = sp.text or "" local sp_end = pos + #sp_text - 1 if sp_end >= s and pos <= e then local clip_s = math.max(pos, s) local clip_e = math.min(sp_end, e) local clipped = sp_text:sub(clip_s - pos + 1, clip_e - pos + 1) if clipped ~= "" then table.insert(result, { text = clipped, fore = rgb_to_hex(sp.textcolour), xterm = rgb_to_xterm(sp.textcolour), }) end end pos = pos + #sp_text end return #result > 0 and result or nil end
-- Build an Aardwolf @xNNN colour-coded string from spans (for channel output) local function spans_to_aard (spans) if not spans then return nil end local t = {} for _, sp in ipairs(spans) do table.insert(t, string.format("@x%03d", sp.xterm) .. sp.text) end return table.concat(t) .. "@w" end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- File save / load ---------------------------------------------------------
local function hex_enc (s) return (s:gsub(".", function(c) return string.format("%02X", string.byte(c)) end)) end
local function hex_dec (s) return (s:gsub("%x%x", function(h) return string.char(tonumber(h, 16)) end)) end
local function save_data () local f = io.open(data_file, "w") if not f then ColourNote("white","red","[PortalUse] Cannot write: " .. data_file) return end f:write("USAGE\n") for portal, count in pairs(usage) do f:write(portal .. "|" .. tostring(count) .. "\n") end f:write("IGNORE\n") for portal in pairs(ignore) do f:write(portal .. "\n") end f:write("BAG\n") f:write(bag_keyword .. "\n") f:write("AREA\n") f:write((show_area and "1" or "0") .. "\n") f:write("COLORS\n") for portal, spans in pairs(colors) do local parts = {} for _, sp in ipairs(spans) do table.insert(parts, hex_enc(sp.text) .. ":" .. sp.fore .. ":" .. tostring(sp.xterm)) end f:write(hex_enc(portal) .. "|" .. table.concat(parts, ",") .. "\n") end f:close() end
local function load_data () local f = io.open(data_file, "r") if not f then return end usage = {} ignore = {} colors = {} local section = "usage" for line in f:lines() do if line == "USAGE" then section = "usage" elseif line == "IGNORE" then section = "ignore" elseif line == "BAG" then section = "bag" elseif line == "AREA" then section = "area" elseif line == "COLORS" then section = "colors" elseif section == "usage" then local name, count = line:match("^(.*)|(%d+)$") if name and count then usage[name] = tonumber(count) end elseif section == "ignore" and line ~= "" then ignore[line] = true elseif section == "bag" and line ~= "" then bag_keyword = line elseif section == "area" and line ~= "" then show_area = (line == "1") elseif section == "colors" and line ~= "" then local enc_portal, spans_str = line:match("^([^|]+)|(.+)$") if enc_portal and spans_str then local portal = hex_dec(enc_portal) local spans = {} for part in spans_str:gmatch("[^,]+") do local enc_text, fore, xterm = part:match("^([^:]+):(#%x+):(%d+)$") if enc_text and fore and xterm then table.insert(spans, { text = hex_dec(enc_text), fore = fore, xterm = tonumber(xterm) }) end end if #spans > 0 then colors[portal] = spans end end end end f:close() end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Plugin lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPluginInstall () load_data() OnPortalHelp() end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Scan ---------------------------------------------------------
local expecting_header = false
function start_scan () if bag_keyword == "" then ColourNote("white","red","[PortalUse] No bag set. Use: portalsetbag <keyword>") return end scan_active = false expecting_header = true EnableTrigger("scan_start", true) EnableTrigger("scan_item", false) EnableTrigger("scan_end", false) ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] Scanning " .. bag_keyword .. " for colours...") SendNoEcho("exa " .. bag_keyword) -- Safety timeout in case scan_end trigger never fires DoAfterSpecial(3, "CallPlugin('3fa92c7bd184e55a9c02b6da','scan_timeout','')", sendto.script) end
function OnScanStart (name, line, wildcards, styles) if not expecting_header then return end expecting_header = false EnableTrigger("scan_start", false) scan_active = true EnableTrigger("scan_item", true) EnableTrigger("scan_end", true) end
function OnScanItem (name, line, wildcards, styles) if not scan_active then return end local plain_name = clean_name(wildcards[1]) if plain_name == "" then return end if ignore[plain_name] then return end if not usage[plain_name] then usage[plain_name] = 0 end local spans = extract_name_styles(styles, plain_name) if spans then colors[plain_name] = spans end end
function OnScanEnd (name, line, wildcards, styles) scan_active = false expecting_header = false EnableTrigger("scan_start", false) EnableTrigger("scan_item", false) EnableTrigger("scan_end", false) save_data() ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] Scan complete. (matched: [" .. line .. "])") end
function scan_timeout () if scan_active then scan_active = false expecting_header = false EnableTrigger("scan_start", false) EnableTrigger("scan_item", false) EnableTrigger("scan_end", false) save_data() ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] Scan complete (timeout).") end end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Trigger: worn portal usage ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalEnter (name, line, wildcards, styles) local portal = clean_name(wildcards[1]) if ignore[portal] then return end usage[portal] = (usage[portal] or 0) + 1 if not colors[portal] then local spans = extract_name_styles(styles, portal) if spans then colors[portal] = spans end end save_data() end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portaluse / portalusage ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalUsage (name, line, wildcards) local mode = string.match(line, "^%S+%s+(%S+)$") mode = mode and string.lower(mode) or "high"
local list = {} for portal, count in pairs(usage) do table.insert(list, { portal = portal, count = count }) end
if mode == "alpha" then table.sort(list, function(a,b) return a.portal < b.portal end) elseif mode == "ralpha" then table.sort(list, function(a,b) return a.portal > b.portal end) elseif mode == "low" then table.sort(list, function(a,b) return a.count < b.count end) else table.sort(list, function(a,b) return a.count > b.count end) end
ColourNote(TC.hdr,"","Portal Usage (" .. mode .. ")")
local areas = show_area and load_portaldex_areas() or nil
for _, entry in ipairs(list) do if not ignore[entry.portal] then -- still honour the ignore list local spans = colors[entry.portal] if spans then for _, sp in ipairs(spans) do ColourTell(sp.fore, "", sp.text) end else ColourTell("blue","", entry.portal) end if areas then local a = areas[entry.portal:lower()] if a then ColourTell(TC.val,"", " [" .. a .. "]") end end ColourTell(TC.hdr, "", " USES: ") ColourTell(TC.num, "", tostring(entry.count)) Note("") end end Note("") Note("") end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portalusetop ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalUseTop (name, line, wildcards) local channel = line:match("^portalusetop%s+(%S+)$") if not channel or channel == "" then ColourNote("white","red","Usage: portalusetop <channel>") return end
local list = {} for portal, count in pairs(usage) do if not ignore[portal] then -- still honour the ignore list table.insert(list, { portal = portal, count = count }) end end table.sort(list, function(a,b) return a.count > b.count end)
local areas = show_area and load_portaldex_areas() or nil
local parts = {} for i = 1, math.min(5, #list) do local entry = list[i] local aard = spans_to_aard(colors[entry.portal]) or entry.portal local areatag = "" if areas then local a = areas[entry.portal:lower()] if a then areatag = "@x045 [" .. a .. "]@w" end end parts[i] = aard .. areatag .. "@w(" .. entry.count .. ")" end
local msg = "Top portals: " .. table.concat(parts, "@w | ") Send(channel .. " " .. msg) end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portalignore ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalIgnore (name, line, wildcards) local arg = wildcards[1] if not arg or arg == "" then ColourNote("white","red","Usage: portalignore <portal> | portalignore list") return end if string.lower(arg) == "list" then ColourNote(TC.hdr,"","Ignored portals:") local any = false for portal in pairs(ignore) do any = true ColourTell("yellow","",portal) Note("") end if not any then ColourNote(TC.num,"","(none)") end return end local portal = clean_name(arg) if ignore[portal] then ignore[portal] = nil ColourNote("white","red","Removed from ignore list: " .. portal) else ignore[portal] = true ColourNote(TC.ok,"","Added to ignore list: " .. portal) end save_data() end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portalreset ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalReset (name, line, wildcards) local arg = string.match(line, "^portalreset%s+(.*)$") if not arg or arg == "" then ColourNote("white","red","Usage: portalreset all | portalreset <portal>") return end if string.lower(arg) == "all" then usage = {} colors = {} ColourNote(TC.hdr,"","All portal usage reset.") save_data() return end local portal = clean_name(arg) if usage[portal] then usage[portal] = nil colors[portal] = nil ColourNote(TC.ok,"","Reset usage for: " .. portal) else ColourNote("white","red","No usage found for: " .. portal) end save_data() end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portalscan / portalsetbag ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalScan (name, line, wildcards) start_scan() end
function OnPortalSetBag (name, line, wildcards) local arg = wildcards[1] and wildcards[1]:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") or "" if arg == "" then if bag_keyword == "" then ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] No bag keyword set. Use: portalsetbag <keyword>") else ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] Current bag keyword: " .. bag_keyword) end return end bag_keyword = arg ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] Bag keyword set to: " .. bag_keyword) save_data() end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portalclean ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalClean (name, line, wildcards) local removed = 0 for portal, count in pairs(usage) do if count == 0 then usage[portal] = nil colors[portal] = nil removed = removed + 1 end end save_data() ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] Removed " .. removed .. " portal(s) with 0 uses.") end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portalarea ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalArea (name, line, wildcards) local arg = (line:match("^portalarea%s+(%S+)") or ""):lower() if arg == "on" then show_area = true elseif arg == "off" then show_area = false elseif arg == "" then show_area = not show_area else ColourNote("white","red","Usage: portalarea on|off"); return end save_data() ColourNote(TC.val,"","[PortalUse] Destination area display is " .. (show_area and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") if show_area and next(load_portaldex_areas()) == nil then ColourNote("white","red"," (No catalog found - this needs PortalValue 3.0 or higher, with a 'portaldex scan' done.)") end end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- portalhelp ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPortalHelp () ColourNote(TC.hdr,"","PortalUse 2.0") ColourNote(TC.val,"","Commands:") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portaluse [mode] -- Show usage (high, low, alpha, ralpha)") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalusetop <channel> -- Send top 5 portals to a channel") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalscan -- Refresh colours, add untracked portals with 0 uses") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalsetbag <keyword> -- Set the bag keyword for portalscan") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalarea on|off -- Show destination area next to each portal") ColourNote(TC.num, ""," requires PortalValue 3.0 or higher (uses its portal catalog)") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalignore <portal> -- Toggle ignoring a portal") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalignore list -- Show ignored portals") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalclean -- Remove all portals with 0 uses") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalreset all -- Reset all usage") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalreset <portal> -- Reset one portal") ColourNote(TC.val,""," portalhelp -- Show this help") end
